underfitting.Metric Description: Test accuracy as a proxy for underfitting.

overfitting.Metric Description: Train-test accuracy gap as a proxy for overfitting.
overfitting.Formula: Overfitting Gap = Accuracy(y_train, y_pred_train) - Accuracy(y_test, y_pred_test)

class_balance.Metric Description: Chi-square test for class balance in label distribution.

statistical_parity_difference.Metric Description: Difference in favorable prediction rates between protected and unprotected groups.
statistical_parity_difference.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
statistical_parity_difference.Formula: Statistical Parity Difference = Favored Ratio Protected - Favored Ratio Unprotected

disparate_impact.Metric Description: Ratio of favorable prediction rates between protected and unprotected groups.
disparate_impact.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
disparate_impact.Formula: Protected Favored Ratio / Unprotected Favored Ratio

equal_opportunity_difference.Metric Description: Difference in true positive rates between protected and unprotected groups.
equal_opportunity_difference.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
equal_opportunity_difference.Formula: Equal Opportunity Difference = TPR Protected - TPR Unprotected

average_odds_difference.Metric Description: Average of the TPR and FPR differences between groups.
average_odds_difference.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
average_odds_difference.Formula: 0.5*(TPR Protected - TPR Unprotected) + 0.5*(FPR Protected - FPR Unprotected)

accuracy_parity.Metric Description: Measures whether prediction accuracy is equal across groups.
accuracy_parity.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)
accuracy_parity.Formula: Accuracy Parity = Accuracy Protected - Accuracy Unprotected

predictive_parity.Metric Description: Checks equality of PPV and NPV between protected and unprotected groups.
predictive_parity.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
predictive_parity.Formula: 0.5*(PPV Protected - PPV Unprotected) + 0.5*(NPV Protected - NPV Unprotected)

treatment_equality.Error: Treatment Equality computation resulted in NaN or Inf. Check if your data has enough samples in each group and class.

calibration_gap.Metric Description: Checks whether individuals with the same predicted score have the same empirical outcome probability in both groups.
calibration_gap.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Probabilistic Scores, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)
calibration_gap.Formula: Calibration Gap = Mean_b(|P(y=1|score bin b, protected) - P(y=1|score bin b, unprotected)|)

well_calibration_error.Metric Description: Checks whether predicted probabilities match empirical outcome frequencies.
well_calibration_error.Formula: Well Calibration Error = Mean_b(|Mean(y in b) - Mean(score in b)|)

generalized_entropy_index.Error: Generalized Entropy Index is undefined when all benefits are zero or all are one. Check your data and predictions.

theil_index.Error: Generalized Entropy Index is undefined when all benefits are zero or all are one. Check your data and predictions.

coefficient_of_variation.Error: Generalized Entropy Index is undefined when all benefits are zero or all are one. Check your data and predictions.

individual_consistency.Metric Description: Measures whether similar individuals receive similar predictions.

class_imbalance.Metric Description: Measures imbalance in size between protected and unprotected groups. 0 indicates perfect balance.

kl_divergence.Metric Description: Divergence between label distributions across groups.

conditional_demographic_disparity.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)

smoothed_edf.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Probabilistic Scores, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)

bias_amplification.Metric Description: Measures whether the model amplifies the bias present in the dataset.
bias_amplification.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)

between_group_generalized_entropy_error.Metric Description: Between-Group Generalized Entropy Error (Speicher et al., 2018).
between_group_generalized_entropy_error.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)
between_group_generalized_entropy_error.Formula: Between-group GEI computes GEI over group-level mean benefits.

cohens_d.Metric Description: Standardised effect size between group predictions.
cohens_d.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)

z_test_diff.Metric Description: Z test (difference) / 2-SD statistic for success rates. Fair if the value stays between -2 and 2.
z_test_diff.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)
z_test_diff.Formula: Z = (SR_protected - SR_unprotected) / sqrt((SR_total * (1 - SR_total)) / (N_total * P_protected * (1 - P_protected)))

train_test_split.Metric Description: Ratio between the training and test set sizes.
train_test_split.Formula: Train Ratio = round(100 * N_train / (N_train + N_test)); Test Ratio = 100 - Train Ratio

missing_data.Metric Description: Number of missing values across the training and test data.

normalization.Metric Description: Normalization strategy inferred from training and test data statistics.
normalization.Formula: Heuristic classification based on train/test mean-std closeness to (0,1) and value ranges in [0,1]

regularization.Metric Description: Regularization technique declared in the factsheet.

factsheet_completeness.Metric Description: Completeness of the factsheet based on present versus expected fields.
factsheet_completeness.Formula: Completeness Ratio = Present Fields / Total Expected Fields

epsilon_dp.Metric Description: Theoretical epsilon value from the factsheet's differential privacy analysis. Lower epsilon implies stronger privacy guarantees (less theoretical leakage).
epsilon_dp.Formula: Epsilon-DP = epsilon (as declared in factsheet privacy analysis)

epsilon_star.Metric Description: Empirical epsilon* estimated from the loss distribution. Lower is better (less membership leakage).
epsilon_star.Formula: epsilon* = log(max over threshold-based membership ratios)

shapr.Metric Description: Approximate membership inference risk estimated with SHAPr. Lower values indicate lower risk.
shapr.Formula: SHAPr Risk = mean marginal contribution in prediction-space nearest-neighbor analysis

attribute_inference.Metric Description: Attribute inference risk for the declared sensitive attribute.
attribute_inference.Depends on: Model, Train/Test Data, and Sensitive Attribute
attribute_inference.Formula: Attribute Inference = attack score predicting sensitive attribute from non-sensitive features and labels

accuracy_ratio.Metric Description: Accuracy ratio between the original model and the data-minimized variant (original/noisy). Values close to 1 indicate minimal performance loss; larger values indicate greater utility loss.
accuracy_ratio.Formula: Accuracy Ratio = Accuracy(original test) / Accuracy(noisy test)

privacy_risk.Metric Description: Membership inference privacy risk derived from predicted probabilities.
privacy_risk.Formula: Privacy Risk = mean posterior membership risk score

k_anonymity.Metric Description: Minimum k value achieved for the quasi-identifier groups. Higher values indicate better privacy protection.
k_anonymity.Formula: k-Anonymity = min over equivalence classes of group size

l_diversity.Metric Description: Minimum l value achieved for the quasi-identifier groups and sensitive attributes.
l_diversity.Depends on: Quasi Identifiers, Sensitive Attributes, and Data
l_diversity.Formula: l-Diversity = min over quasi-identifier groups of distinct sensitive values

t_closeness.Metric Description: Maximum t value measuring distribution closeness within quasi-identifier groups.
t_closeness.Depends on: Quasi Identifiers, Sensitive Attributes, and Data
t_closeness.Formula: t-Closeness = max distance between group-sensitive distribution and global-sensitive distribution

energy_consumed.Metric Description: Total training energy consumed (CPU + GPU + RAM).
energy_consumed.Formula: Energy Consumed = CPU Energy + GPU Energy + RAM Energy

emissions.Metric Description: Total CO2 emissions during training estimated (Energy consumed * Carbon Intensity).

carbon_intensity.Metric Description: Carbon intensity in kgCO2 per kWh based on energy use and location.

sparsity.Metric Description: Fraction of features whose SHAP importance is above the configured threshold.

feature_entropy.Metric Description: Normalized entropy of the global SHAP importance distribution across features. Lower values indicate that importance is concentrated in fewer features, while higher values suggest a more even distribution of importance.

topk_concentration.Metric Description: Fraction of total global SHAP importance captured by the top-k most important features. Higher values indicate that a small subset of features accounts for most of the importance.
topk_concentration.Formula: Top-K Concentration = sum(top-k global importances) / sum(all global importances)

algorithm_class.Metric Description: Identifies the model class using the provided model type or inferred model class name.
algorithm_class.Formula: Algorithm Class Score is assigned via mapping by model_type

correlated_features.Metric Description: Percentage of features highly correlated with at least one other feature in combined train and test data.
correlated_features.Formula: Correlated Features = (# features with any |corr| >= threshold) / (# features)

model_size.Metric Description: Number of input features in the training data.
model_size.Formula: Model Size = Number of input features

feature_relevance.Metric Description: Percentage of features considered irrelevant because their importance is below the configured threshold.
feature_relevance.Formula: Feature Relevance = (# features with importance > threshold) / (# features)

alpha_score.Metric Description: Fraction of top features needed to reach the alpha share of total feature importance.
alpha_score.Formula: Alpha Score = (# top features needed to reach alpha cumulative importance) / (# features)

xai_ease_score.Error: No features with PDP averages found in global ranked features.

position_parity.Metric Description: Average cumulative alignment between conditional feature rankings and the global feature ranking.
position_parity.Formula: Position Parity = mean over groups of cumulative positional overlap with global ranking

rank_alignment.Metric Description: Jaccard similarity between top-alpha features from conditional and global importance distributions.
rank_alignment.Formula: Rank Alignment = mean_g Jaccard(Top(global), Top(group g))

spread_ratio.Metric Description: Evenness of the feature importance distribution compared against a uniform distribution.
spread_ratio.Formula: Spread Ratio = min(normalized importances) / max(normalized importances)

spread_divergence.Metric Description: Jensen-Shannon divergence between the feature importance distribution and an even distribution.

faithfulness.Metric Description: Correlation between feature importance weights and the prediction change when each feature is replaced by a baseline value.
faithfulness.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Local Feature Weights, and Base Values
faithfulness.Formula: Faithfulness = corr(feature importance, prediction change after feature removal)

monotonicity.Metric Description: Proportion of instances where prediction confidence increases monotonically as features are added by importance.
monotonicity.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Local Feature Weights, and Base Values
monotonicity.Formula: Monotonicity = (# instances with monotonic confidence progression) / (# instances)

infidelity.Metric Description: Measures whether perturbations on important features produce proportional changes in model output.
infidelity.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Local Feature Weights
infidelity.Formula: Infidelity = expected discrepancy between attribution-weighted perturbation and model output change

number_of_rules.Error: Model does not provide number of rules.

average_rule_length.Error: Model does not provide tree structure.

tree_depth.Error: Model does not provide tree depth.

xai_consistency_score.Metric Description: Average pairwise Jaccard similarity of top-k features across LIME, SHAP, and PDP importance rankings.
xai_consistency_score.Depends on: Model, Test Data, SHAP Global Importances, and PDP Importances
xai_consistency_score.Formula: XAI Consistency = mean pairwise Jaccard similarity among top-k feature sets from multiple XAI methods
xai_consistency_score.Top-K Rankings Details:
Top-5 features LIME: diff_srv_rate, count, serror_rate, num_root, dst_host_diff_srv_rate, with importances: 0.009, 0.005, 0.004, 0.004, 0.003
Top-5 features SHAP: flag, service, dst_host_count, dst_host_same_srv_rate, src_bytes, with importances: 0.001, 0.001, 0.000, 0.000, 0.000
Top-5 features PDP: , with importances:

accuracy_drop.Metric Description: Worst-case accuracy drop across the available attack suite.
accuracy_drop.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results
accuracy_drop.Formula: Accuracy Drop = Clean Accuracy - Adversarial Accuracy

HSJ.note: HSJ attack metrics on correctly classified subset. Full subset adv accuracy also reported.

asr.Metric Description: Worst-case attack success rate across the available attack suite.
asr.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results

adversarial_accuracy.Metric Description: Worst-case adversarial accuracy across the available attack suite.
adversarial_accuracy.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results

adversarial_accuracy_correct_only.Metric Description: Worst-case adversarial accuracy restricted to originally correctly classified samples.
adversarial_accuracy_correct_only.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results
adversarial_accuracy_correct_only.Formula: Adversarial Accuracy (Correct-Only) = Accuracy on adversarial examples generated from originally correct samples

robustness_ratio.Metric Description: Worst-case robustness ratio (Adversarial Accuracy / Clean Accuracy) across the available attack suite.
robustness_ratio.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results
robustness_ratio.Formula: Robustness Ratio = Adversarial Accuracy / Clean Accuracy

empirical_robustness_l2.Metric Description: Worst-case empirical robustness measured with L2 distance for successful attacks.
empirical_robustness_l2.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results
empirical_robustness_l2.Formula: ER-L2 = mean(||x_adv - x||_2) over successful attacks

empirical_robustness_linf.Metric Description: Worst-case empirical robustness measured with Linf distance for successful attacks.
empirical_robustness_linf.Depends on: Model, Test Data, and Attack Results
empirical_robustness_linf.Formula: ER-Linf = mean(||x_adv - x||_inf) over successful attacks

clique_method.Error: Clique Method requires input features to be normalized to [0, 1].

clever_score.Error: CLEVER requires an ART classifier with class_gradient and loss_gradient (e.g., PyTorchClassifier / TensorFlowV2Classifier).

loss_sensitivity.Error: Loss Sensitivity metric requires an ART classifier with predict method (e.g., PyTorchClassifier / TensorFlowV2Classifier). Error: 'ScaledModelWrapper' object has no attribute 'loss_gradient'

confidence_score.Metric Description: Confidence score computed from thresholded prediction consistency. Average Jaccard index (TP / (TP + FP + FN)) over multiple probability thresholds, where predictions are binarized at each threshold. Higher indicates more confident predictions.

expected_calibration_error.Metric Description: Expected Calibration Error computed as the weighted gap between confidence and accuracy across bins.
